_doc: Jumpstart 2022 (J22, 2022-12-02) — sold ONLY as Jumpstart Boosters, so `authoritative` offers just the Jumpstart pack (no play/draft/collector). APPROXIMATE recipe: no official 'Collecting' drop-rate article was processed, so a representative 20-card Jumpstart structure is used (two themed half-decks + lands, ~1 rare/mythic). Refine from an official source when available.

jumpstart.tagline: 20 cards · two themed half-decks + lands · shuffle together and play
